goal: Fix the real-adapter M6-RC closeout sequence by adding an endpoint-evidence-only runner mode and updating the CUDA handoff so operators can capture live no-fake endpoint evidence first, then update M6 review docs to GO, and only then run M6 GO verification, evidence bundle assembly, and v0 readiness. This removes the current sequencing gap without claiming M6-RC/v0 GO from local artifacts.
head: 8335d89
blocked_scope: Changing endpoint capture, adapter intake, bundle, M6 verifier, or v0 readiness acceptance policy
Editing M6 review signoff/CTO docs to claim GO
Pulling Docker images, running CUDA training, or downloading dependencies as part of the committed phase
Creating or committing model weights, adapters, endpoint transcripts, copied external evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add endpoint-evidence-only orchestration to run_m6_real_adapter_rc_gate.py, update the generated real-adapter CUDA handoff command sequence and focused tests, refresh current NOT_GO verification artifacts, and update WORKING.md plus this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: Endpoint-evidence-only mode runs adapter intake and live endpoint capture but does not run M6 GO verification or claim M6-RC GO
Handoff command sequence now captures endpoint evidence before the required M6 review-doc GO update and only then runs M6 GO verification
Evidence bundle assembly remains after M6 GO verification and before v0 readiness recheck
Current local M6/v0 readiness remains NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker
warnings: M6-RC remains NOT_GO until real CUDA training and no-fake Docker endpoint evidence are collected.
This gate does not edit docs/reviews/M6 to GO and does not claim release readiness.

phase_notes.plan: Open a scoped closeout-sequence gate for endpoint-first real-adapter evidence collection.
phase_notes.audit: Confirmed the current direct runner jumps from endpoint capture to M6 GO verification, while GO verification now requires M6 review docs to already be GO.
phase_notes.build: Added --endpoint-evidence-only to run_m6_real_adapter_rc_gate.py and updated the generated CUDA handoff sequence to capture endpoint evidence before the M6 review-doc GO marker check and full M6 GO gate.
phase_notes.check: Focused runner/handoff tests passed, handoff artifacts regenerated, current M6/v0 readiness remained expected NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the only release blocker, and M1 smoke bootstrap passed in .venv.
phase_notes.done: Phase verified. Stage, commit, and push are approved by the user phase policy; release readiness remains NOT_GO until real trained adapter no-fake endpoint evidence exists.

pabcd.approved_scope: Endpoint-first real-adapter RC runner mode, generated CUDA handoff sequence, focused tests, refreshed NOT_GO artifacts, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product runtime/API/UI/DB/schema/training changes, no verifier acceptance weakening, no M6 review doc GO edit, no Docker/CUDA execution, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
